allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('members.json'\)\);print\('groups:',[g['group'] for g in d['researchers']]\);print\('UBEM role-lines:',[p['roleLine'] for p in d['profiles'].values\(\) if 'UBEM' in p['roleLine']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('News_Blog_JPG/beelab_content/news.json'\)\);z=[it['folder'] for it in d if it['image_count']==0];print\('image_count=0:',z if z else '없음 ✅'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,unicodedata; [print\(repr\(l.rstrip\(\)\)\) for l in sys.stdin if '야구장' in unicodedata.normalize\('NFC',l\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import yaml;c=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.pages.yml'\)\);print\('parsed OK:',[x['name'] for x in c['content']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,os;bad=sum\(1 for t in ['news','blog'] for it in json.load\(open\(f'News_Blog_JPG/beelab_content/{t}.json'\)\) for p in it['images'] if not os.path.isfile\(p\)\);print\('없는 경로:', bad if bad else '0 ✅'\)")
